public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as caravan outrider.
manner: Reads roads, loads, and people as one shared logistics problem rather than separate categories. In Psanan, that reads as someone heat-forged, direct, and honor-conscious, shaped by household authority and volcanic endurance, and the habits of a caravan outrider still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of caravan outrider in and around Scarlet Descent Road, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Scarlet Descent Road workable through the obligations of caravan outrider while managing the immediate pressure of eruption risk in Psanan.
hidden_pressure: Must turn uncertain terrain and changing terms into something people can actually traverse. Around Scarlet Descent Road, that usually means carrying eruption risk, resource access, underworld danger without letting the role of caravan outrider visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Soryn Cindercrest can pull the party into chokepoints, timing failures, or rival claims over how movement should happen.
Soryn Cindercrest will share route intelligence, hidden timing, or safer alternatives if the party proves useful under travel pressure.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Travel kit, route marks, and timing-focused movement signal that Soryn Cindercrest lives by roads, passages, or convoy rhythm.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Scarlet Descent Road: roads, caravan nodes, docks, ferries, route desks, or loading seams
who_avoids_them: those who do not respect route discipline
